evals.prompt: I just finished adding a password reset feature to the auth module. Can you update the design docs to reflect the changes? I added a new API endpoint and a reset_token column to the users table.
evals.expected_output: Detects changed files via git diff, maps them to docs/specs/user-authentication.md, updates the Data Model section (new column) and API Endpoints section (new endpoint). Updates project-overview.md if needed. Reports what changed.

evals.prompt: 설계서 업데이트 해줘. 이번 스프린트에서 QnA 기능이랑 투어 신청 기능 둘 다 수정했어.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes git diff, maps changes to both docs/specs/qna.md and docs/specs/tour-application.md, updates both documents, reports a summary of all changes made.

evals.prompt: We merged a big PR that added a notifications system. The design docs are probably out of date now. Can you check and update everything?
evals.expected_output: Scans git diff for all changed files, maps to existing design docs, updates affected ones. Detects that notifications/ is a new feature with no design doc and suggests running /design-doc to create one.
